reasoning: The market probability for this event was 0.14 on Oct 30, 2025. At that time, there were roughly 6 SNL episodes left in the year (Nov 1, Nov 8, Nov 15, and typically 3 in December). Since Oct 30, two episodes have aired (Nov 1 with Miles Teller and Nov 8 with Nikki Glaser). Extensive searches for 'Waymo' and 'Saturday Night Live' yield no evidence of any skit featuring the company in those recent episodes or any time earlier in 2025. With only about 4 episodes remaining in the year and the timely relevance of self-driving cars (such as Tesla's mid-October Robotaxi event) fading slightly in the news cycle, the likelihood continues to decrease. Adjusting the Oct 30 market probability of 0.14 for the passage of two episodes leaves us with an estimated base rate of around 0.08 to 0.09 for the remainder of the year.
